product_context.product_name: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
product_context.one_line_value: Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and IP

raw_research.deep_research_paste: James Okafor has led Meridian Health Sciences since 2020 and has taken the company from Series B to pre-commercial stage. He has a background in pharma commercialization from his time at two large pharmaceutical companies. He has publicly discussed the cost and reputational impact of late-stage trademark conflicts in drug naming, noting that one recent incident cost the company seven figures and delayed their brand launch by three months. He is focused on de-risking the commercialization path for their lead asset.
raw_research.company_notes: Meridian Health Sciences is a mid-stage biotech and specialty pharma company with a pipeline of 8 compounds in clinical development. They have an active trademark filing program tied to brand names for upcoming commercial launches. Their IP counsel has flagged that trademark screening is a bottleneck ahead of two anticipated NDA submissions. They have experienced two naming conflicts in the past 18 months requiring costly rebrand or licensing.

offer_lock: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
